package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for shared_gorm_db_state_mutated_and_reused_across_requests: Code that mutates shared `*gorm.DB` state and reuses it as if it were immutable configuration.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule185NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule185NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule185NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario185Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule185NegativeService, input Rule185NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
